meaning: adv.急速地,轻率地,慌忙地,草率地
examples: Gary hastily pushed the drawer back into place.
He took out a slab of cheese, pared off a slice and ate it hastily.
On Sept. 9, the Patriots will play their season opener at the hastily renamed Gillette Stadium.
The deal was negotiated hastily and in secret by a clutch of senior administration officials.
